title: draba × asplundii
intro: Draba × asplundii, also known as Asplund's draba, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. As a medicinal plant, it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Draba × asplundii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
